title: Tach Goal Event
description: One immutable entry in a goal run's append-only history (events.jsonl). Each line of the log is one event. Carries a logical sequence number rather than a wall clock, so deterministic runs produce byte-identical logs.

event_id.description: Stable id derived from seq, e.g. evt_000007.

seq.description: Monotonic sequence number within the run.

kind.description: The event kind. The vocabulary is open for forward compatibility; the documented kinds are listed in the enum.
